request.description:
These `params` control how the **Twitter Profile Scraper** behaves — specifically whether to return parsed fields or the raw API response.

➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Twitter Profile Scraper**. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the `params` Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._

| Parameter | Type    | Description                                                                                              |
| --------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **json**  | boolean | If `true`, returns the complete raw JSON payload for the user profile, before any internal data parsing. |

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects are returned by the **Twitter Profile Scraper**. Each record represents one user profile.

| **Field**                                     | Type             | Description                                                                                             |
|-----------------------------------------------|------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| **id**                                        | integer          | Unique identifier for this result record.                                                              |
| **object**                                    | string           | Always `"result"`.                                                                                      |
| **squid**                                     | string           | Hash ID of the squid that produced this result.                                                         |
| **run**                                       | string           | Hash ID of the run during which this result was scraped.                                                |
| **_json**                                     | string (JSON)    | Raw JSON payload returned by Twitter’s API, before any parsing.                                         |
| **affiliates_highlighted_label_description**   | string           | Text description for any highlighted affiliate label (e.g., “X”).                                       |
| **affiliates_highlighted_label_user_label_type** | string         | Type of affiliate label (e.g., `BusinessLabel`).                                                        |
| **bio**                                       | string           | User’s profile biography text.                                                                          |
| **created_at**                                | string (ISO)     | Account creation timestamp (e.g., `"2009-06-02T20:12:29Z"`).                                             |
| **creator_subscriptions_count**               | integer          | Number of subscriptions the user’s account has created (e.g., paid promoter subscriptions).             |
| **favourites_count**                          | integer          | Total number of tweets this user has favorited.                                                        |
| **followers_count**                           | integer          | Total number of followers.                                                                             |
| **following_count**                           | integer          | Total number of accounts the user is following.                                                        |
| **functions**                                 | object or null   | Reserved for future function metadata (currently `null`).                                              |
| **internal_id**                               | string           | Twitter’s internal user identifier (the same as `rest_id`).                                            |
| **is_blue_verified**                          | boolean          | `true` if the account is Blue Verified.                                                                |
| **listed_count**                              | integer          | Number of public lists the user appears in.                                                            |
| **location**                                  | string           | User-specified location field from their profile.                                                      |
| **media_count**                               | integer          | Number of media items (images/videos) the user has tweeted.                                            |
| **name**                                      | string           | Display name of the user (e.g., “Elon Musk”).                                                          |
| **native_id**                                 | integer          | Native scraper identifier (often matches `id`).                                                        |
| **normal_followers_count**                    | integer          | Follower count excluding special or proxy counts.                                                      |
| **possibly_sensitive**                        | boolean          | `true` if the user’s content is potentially sensitive.                                                 |
| **posts_count**                               | integer          | Total number of tweets (statuses) the user has posted.                                                 |
| **profile_banner_url**                        | string (URL)     | URL of the user’s profile banner image.                                                                |
| **profile_image_shape**                       | string           | Shape setting for the profile image (e.g., `Circle`).                                                  |
| **profile_image_url_https**                   | string (URL)     | HTTPS URL of the user’s profile image.                                                                 |
| **scraping_time**                             | string (ISO)     | Timestamp when this profile was fetched by the scraper.                                                |
| **screen_name**                               | string           | User’s handle (without the `@`).                                                                       |
| **super_follow_eligible**                     | boolean          | `true` if the user is eligible for Super Follows.                                                      |
| **verification_info_reason_description_text** | string           | Explanation text for the account’s verification status.                                                |
| **verified_since_msec**                       | string or integer| Millisecond timestamp (or offset) indicating when the account was verified.                            |
| **website**                                   | string (URL)     | URL of the user’s personal or business website (if provided).                                          |

response.name: Example
